title: codereview-pass3: coap_dtn.c deaddrop_post and confessions_post still perform plain coap_packet_get_payload without coap_oscore_unprotect_request or is_protected check
description: P0 security: OSCORE integration incomplete per parent project-LICHEN-2h1i.2.4.2 and coap_oscore.h API. Handlers must lookup ctx (via eui64 from sockaddr?) and unprotect before storing payload. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-88rm
close_reason: OSCORE unprotect + ctx lookup from sockaddr + rate limit fix implemented in deaddrop_post and confessions_post. Matches coap_oscore.h API and parent spec. Tests via oscore native_sim pass. Commit ab04e46da
